---
title: "xmsannotator-introduction"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{xmsannotator-introduction}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(xMSannotator)

#read sample data
testdata <- read.csv(system.file(
  "extdata",
  "example_data_table.csv",
  package = "xMSannotator"
))

#call multilevelannotation function
res <- multilevelannotation(testdata,max.mz.diff=10,max.rt.diff = 10,mode="pos",db_name = "HMDB",clustmethod = "auto",outloc="~/xMSannotatoroutv1.4/")

#returns a list with stage 4 and stage 5 results
print(names(res))

```

## Session information

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
